emails.subject: Promotion
emails.body: Promotion Sally: Just a short note to congratulate you on your well-deserved promotion. I always thought you had the toughest job in the Company; I guess everybody else finally caught on! Jordan

emails.subject: Re: Promotion
emails.body: Re: Promotion Thanks for your nice note. I hope that you are having fun in your new role. We will have to schedule lunch so that I can catch up on what you are doing now. --Sally Jordan Mintz 01/15/2001 04:12 PM
